程序包 com.ifels.controlflex.api

接口 IInputProvider

public interface IInputProvider
Provides read-only access to the controller's hardware state.
从以下版本开始:
1.0.0

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    @Nullable IControllerCapabilities
    getCapabilities()
    Get the hardware capabilities of the currently connected controller.
    @Nullable IControllerState
    getControllerState()
    Get the current controller state.
    int
    getGamepadIndex()
    Get the index of the currently selected gamepad.
    @Nullable String
    getGamepadName()
    Get the name of the currently selected gamepad.
    boolean
    isConnected()
    Check if a controller is currently connected and selected.

  • 方法详细资料

    • isConnected

      boolean isConnected()
      Check if a controller is currently connected and selected.

    • getControllerState

      @Nullable @Nullable IControllerState getControllerState()
      Get the current controller state.

      The returned object is a read-only live view that reflects the latest polled values. Only read from the client main thread. Do NOT cache the returned reference across ticks.

      返回:
      controller state view, or null if unavailable

    • getGamepadName

      @Nullable @Nullable String getGamepadName()
      Get the name of the currently selected gamepad.
      返回:
      gamepad name (e.g., "Xbox Wireless Controller"), or null if none

    • getGamepadIndex

      int getGamepadIndex()
      Get the index of the currently selected gamepad.
      返回:
      gamepad index (0-based), or -1 if none

    • getCapabilities

      @Nullable @Nullable IControllerCapabilities getCapabilities()
      Get the hardware capabilities of the currently connected controller. Bridge mods can use this to adapt UI (e.g., show correct button glyphs).
      返回:
      capabilities, or null if no controller is connected
